items.title: NICE updates evidence generation reporting expectations for COPD digital therapeutics
items.summary: Commissioners are reminded of annual reporting requirements under HTG736 during the three-year evidence generation window.

items.title: Digital Clinical Blueprints: ICB planning windows for digitally enabled pathways
items.summary: National guidance encourages alignment between remote monitoring programmes and local cardiovascular and respiratory pathways.

items.title: MHRA emphasises vigilance for software as a medical device in community settings
items.summary: Useful context for DTAC, clinical safety and governance conversations with provider collaboratives.
